description: Karaite agreement regarding inheritance and estate arrangements. Dated Wednesday 3 Elul 5532 AM (1772 CE). Location: Cairo. The court procedures center on the estate of the Avraham b. David Ṣemaḥ aka Ẓānī and his outstanding debts. The deceased man's surviving brother, Moshe b. David Ṣemaḥ aka Ẓānī, appears before the court as the estate representative. The financial arrangements involve a variety of Karaite community members, namely: Eliyahu aka Rāẓī, Sitūta bt. Yosef Berakha, and Shemuʾel b. Shabbetay aka Feyrūz. There are three witness signatures in the hand of the scribe Shelomo Kohen aka Khanzī Dimashqī. MCD.
description_he: הסכם קראי בנוגע לירושה ועיזבון. תאריך: ד', ג' אלול 5532 = 1772 לספירה. מיקום: קהיר. הליכי בית הדין סביב עיזבון אברהם ב' דוד צמח הידוע כצאני וחובותיו. אחיו משה מופיע כנציג העיזבון.
